author: claude-code-agent

patch.value: SDK unified author-time preflight capstone: preflightExtension + assertExtensionPreflight

Unify the SDK three separate author-time checks (lintExtensionBlueprint, synthesizeExtensionManifest, checkExtensionManifestCompatibility) into one pure preflightExtension(blueprint, options) capstone returning a consolidated ExtensionPreflightReport, plus a throwing assertExtensionPreflight CI/test bookend. Author-time analog of createExtensionTestHarness (pm-jcyn) which unified the runtime-test helpers: one call validates a declarative package before publishing instead of chaining 4-5 asserts. SDK-only, consistent with lint/synthesize/compat (none have CLI surface).

message: Track unified author-time preflight capstone feature

author: claude-code-agent
message: Link capstone feature to its unified author-time legs and the runtime-test harness analog

patch.value: preflightExtension (compose.ts) + assertExtensionPreflight (testing.ts) unify blueprint lint + manifest synthesis + version-compat into one report/one assert — the author-time analog of createExtensionTestHarness. SDK-only, consistent with lint/synthesize/compat. Docs: SDK.md export lists + capstone prose; EXTENSIONS.md note. Gates: build, quality:static, docs-skills, contracts:check, security:scan all green; full coverage 100/100/100/100 (4966 tests); temp-dir smoke against built dist passed.
Capstone makes pre-publish validation one call.
